summary: Very good overall sound with minor speed issues, complemented by an excellent band performance.
review: The reviewer praises the audio as very good but notes occasional speed fluctuations that suggest tape damage from heat or moisture, giving the recording a slightly minimal character. Despite these technical quirks, the show itself is described as an excellent performance, earning a full five‑star rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed review gives a perfect show rating but mentions recording flaws; weighted average yields a high overall score, though confidence is low due to only one source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Minor speed issues and tape damage (heat/moisture) cause occasional slowing; overall sound remains very good but minimal in some sections.
